term: Floating Around Accidentally Like on a Breeze
pronunciation: /ˈfloʊtɪŋ əˈraʊnd ækˈsɪdəntəli laɪk ɑːn ə briːz/
englishDefinitions: Moving or happening in a casual, uncontrolled, or accidental way, as if carried by the wind.
Passing around or drifting without a clear plan or intention.
persianTranslation: به‌طور اتفاقی و بی‌هدف در فضا پخش شدن
بدون قصد و برنامه پخش شدن
examples: Rumors were floating around accidentally like on a breeze after the meeting.
The note seemed to be floating around accidentally like on a breeze through the office.
Ideas can start floating around accidentally like on a breeze before anyone takes them seriously.
